data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the unified scope model for all sources versus selected sources. However, the provided evidence does not include any information or checks related to this specific requirement. The evidence focuses on other aspects of the saga but fails to address the necessary validation for the unified scope model, indicating a gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence of the unified scope model for all sources vs selected sources.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for unified scope model
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the unified scope model requirement.
